JOIN THE MOVEMENT

Stop Practising Alone.

Join 128 years of Ayurveda credibility. Get patients, products, and a brand that works for you — while you stay independent.

APPLY NOW — IT'S FREESEE WHAT MEMBERS GET

THE REALITY

Authentic Ayurveda is Losing to Marketing.

storefront

Fighting Big Pharma Alone

Independent clinics are outspent by FMCG brands selling diluted "Ayurvedic" cosmetics.

inventory_2

Supply Chain Headaches

Procuring authentic, compliant, and consistently effective medicines takes time away from healing.

trending_down

Limited Patient Reach

Without a massive marketing budget, even the best practitioners struggle to build a steady patient flow.

The Jammi Ayurveda Movement

JAM is a cooperative federation of India's finest independent traditional healers. We provide the 128-year credibility, the pan-India patient network, and the clinical formulary. You provide the healing. Together, we reclaim the narrative of genuine Ayurveda.

arrow_forward
Collective Power

Leverage the strength of a national brand while keeping your clinic 100% yours.

arrow_forward
Clinical Certainty

Access 100+ AYUSH-licensed formulations proven over three generations.

arrow_forward
Democratic Voice

A movement run for practitioners, guided by clinical results, not just profits.

hub

Federation Network

The Federation Advantage

Everything you need to scale your practice without compromising your principles.

payments

25% Wholesale Margins

Direct access to the Jammi formulary at exclusive member pricing.

verified

Clinic Accreditation

"JAM Authorized" signage and digital badges for your practice.

people

Patient Referrals

Direct routing of local patients from our digital platforms to your clinic.

menu_book

Clinical Protocols

Access 128 years of documented efficacy and dosage guidelines.

forum

Peer Network

Connect with elite practitioners for case discussions and mentorship.

campaign

Marketing Cover

Benefit from JAM's national advertising and public trust campaigns.

THE BLUEPRINT

Not a Franchise. A Cooperative.

Like Amul did for dairy farmers, JAM organizes independent Ayurveda practitioners under one trusted national brand. We handle the manufacturing, compliance, and large-scale brand building. You handle the patients. We share the success.

The Corporate Model

  • ✕ You pay massive franchise fees.
  • ✕ You lose your clinic's identity.
  • ✕ Aggressive sales targets imposed.
  • ✕ Profits flow upward to investors.
The JAM Model

The Federation Model

  • ✓ Zero joining or franchise fees.
  • ✓ Your clinic remains 100% yours.
  • ✓ Prescribe only what patients need.
  • ✓ Margins and growth stay with the healer.

Membership Tiers

Choose your level of engagement with the movement.

Associate Member

Free

For practitioners testing the waters.

  • ★ Wholesale pricing catalog access
  • ★ Basic clinical protocols
  • ★ Monthly newsletter
Select Tier
RECOMMENDED

Founding Member

Invite Only

For committed partners growing with JAM.

  • ★ Permanent 25% Margin lock
  • ★ Active patient routing from jammi.in
  • ★ Full Clinic Accreditation Kit
  • ★ Peer network access & vote rights
  • ★ Dedicated account manager support
Apply For Founding Status

Institution

Custom

For multi-doctor clinics and hospitals.

  • ★ Bulk supply chain integration
  • ★ White-label prescription options
  • ★ Clinical research partnerships

We respect your privacy. All details remain confidential.

Common Questions

No. You remain 100% independent. JAM is a cooperative movement where authentic practitioners share resources, formulations, and credibility. You retain complete ownership of your clinic.

You must be a qualified Ayurveda practitioner (BAMS / MD) with a dedicated clinic and a commitment to authentic practice over commercial shortcuts.

Members receive access to Jammi's entire 128-year formulary at an exclusive 25% wholesale discount. You dispense directly to your patients at MRP.

No. We believe in prescribing what the patient needs, not meeting sales quotas. Order only what you require.

Yes. We respect your independence. However, members find that the clinical efficacy of Jammi formulations naturally becomes the core of their practice.
